since_last: 71% of 85 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +6.95%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 71% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +1.17% · BTC -4.15% · Gold -2.84% · Nasdaq100 +2.57%. 71% of 85 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +6.95%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +6.95%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.23%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SMR is the standout at +13.69%
cards.body: Leaders: SMR +13.69%, CEVA +10.89%, INTC +10.70%, SMCI +10.35%, LSCC +9.87%. Laggards: INOD -6.75%, IBM -4.88%, WDAY -3.90%, SPCX -3.56%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -3.56% at $184.99
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -3.56% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
